reasoning: Your key limiter is your lactate clearance and aerobic base. The recent ride suggested you're recovering and your HR was fairly high for low power, indicating room for improvement in fatigue resistance. These over-unders will mimic Alpine Loop demands by helping stabilize lactate levels during prolonged climbs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 x 7 min over-unders: 4 min @ 201-218W, 3 min @ 242-256W, 3 min rest between sets

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
